conditions.name: CondEntityStorageBlockFull
patterns: entity storage of %block% is(n't| not) full

conditions.name: CondIsOwnedByRegion
patterns: chunk at %integer%,[ ]%integer% (in|of) %world% is[n't] owned by current region

effects.name: EffAttributeModifierRemoveByKey
patterns: remove [%attributetypes%] attribute modifier with key %string/namespacedkey% from %itemtypes/entities%

effects.name: EffComponentReplace
patterns: component [regex] replace [first] %strings% with %object% in %textcomponents% [with case sensitivity]
component [regex] replace [first] %strings% in %textcomponents% with %object% [with case sensitivity]

effects.name: EffCookingRecipe
patterns: register [new] (furnace|(blast furnace|blasting)|smok(er|ing)|campfire) recipe for %itemtype% (using|with ingredient) %itemtype/recipechoice% with id %string% [[and ]with exp[erience] %number%] [[and ]with cook[ ]time %timespan%] [in group %string%]

effects.name: EffCraftingRecipe
patterns: register [new] (shaped|shapeless) recipe for %itemtype% (using|with ingredients) %itemtypes/recipechoices% with id %string% [in group %string%]

effects.name: EffResourcePackSend
patterns: send [the] resource pack [from [[the] URL]] %string% with (uuid|id) %string% [with hash %string%] [with prompt %string%] to %players% [with force]

effects.name: EffSendSignChange
patterns: make %players% see [front|back] sign lines (at|of) %blocks% as %textcomponents% [with color %color%] [and glowing]

effects.name: EffStonecuttingRecipe
patterns: register [new] stone[ ]cutt(ing|er) recipe for %itemtype% (using|with ingredient) %itemtype/recipechoice% with id %string% [in group %string%]

effects.name: EffWorldCreatorSetGenerator
patterns: set chunk generator of %worldcreator% to chunk generator with id %string%

expressions.name: ExprBossBarCreate
patterns: [new] boss[ ]bar [(named|with id) %string%] with title %string% [with (color|colour) %color%] [with style %bossbarstyle%] [with progress %number%]

expressions.name: ExprChestInventory
patterns: [a [new]] chest inventory with component name %textcomponent% [with %number% row[s]]
[a [new]] chest inventory with %number% row[s] with component name %textcomponent%

expressions.name: ExprClickEvent
patterns: [a] [new] click event to copy %string% to clipboard
[a] [new] click event to change to page %number%
[a] [new] click event to run custom payload with key %string/namespacedkey% [and] with [custom] data %nbtcompound%

expressions.name: ExprDamageSourceProperties
patterns: [the] (causing entity|direct entity|damage type|damage location|food exhaustion|source location) of %damagesources%
%damagesources%'[s] (causing entity|direct entity|damage type|damage location|food exhaustion|source location)

expressions.name: ExprMerchantRecipe
patterns: [new] merchant recipe with result %itemtype% with max uses %number% [with uses %number%] [(|with experience reward)] [with villager experience %number%] [with price multiplier %number%] [with demand %number%] [with special price %number%]

expressions.name: ExprMerchantRecipeValues
patterns: merchant recipe (demand|max uses|price multiplier|special price|uses|villager experience) of %merchantrecipe%

expressions.name: ExprNBTUuid
patterns: uuid (int array[( as string)]|most[ bits]|least[ bits]) [(from|of) %offlineplayer/entity%]

expressions.name: ExprObjCreate
patterns: objective with id %string% with [criteria] %criteria/string% named %string% [(for|of|from) %scoreboard%] [with render[ ]type %rendertype%] [(with|in) [display[ ]slot] %displayslot%]

expressions.name: ExprRayTraceFromEntity
patterns: ray[ ]trace from %livingentities% [with max distance %number%] [with ray size %number%] [while ignoring passable blocks] [while (ignoring|only allowing) %entities/entitydatas%][while going through %blocks/itemtypes%]

expressions.name: ExprRayTraceFromLocation
patterns: ray[ ]trace from %location% along %vectors% [with max distance %number%] [with ray size %number%] [while ignoring passable blocks] [while (ignoring|only allowing) %entities/entitydatas%] [while going through %blocks/itemtypes%]

expressions.name: ExprTeamState
patterns: [the] (allow friendly fire|can see friendly invisibles) team state of %teams%
%teams%'[s] (allow friendly fire|can see friendly invisibles) team state

expressions.name: ExprWorldCreator
patterns: [a] [new] world creator (with name|named) %string% [with key %namespacedkey%] to (copy|clone) %world% [without saving]

expressions.name: ExprWorldCreatorOption
patterns: [the] (environment|world type|world seed|gen[erator] settings|generator|should gen[erate] structures|[is] hardcore|keep spawn loaded|load on start|fixed spawn location) [option] of %worldcreator%
%worldcreator%'[s] (environment|world type|world seed|gen[erator] settings|generator|should gen[erate] structures|[is] hardcore|keep spawn loaded|load on start|fixed spawn location) [option]
